message:
fix(serialize): ensure raptorq repair count meets decoder k_prime minimum

Move InactivationDecoder initialization before SystematicEncoder setup to
extract decoder parameters early. Calculate repair symbol count as the
maximum of user-specified value and decoder k_prime requirement, preventing
potential encoding failures when insufficient repair symbols are requested.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
